news.summary:
# Summary

The café is now operational again on the city's iconic central square, which serves as a major gathering and dining destination. Visitors to Antwerp will want to know about this reopened venue as it's a prime spot to enjoy drinks and food while experiencing the historic architecture and atmosphere of the city's most important public space.
